problem id: ab71eaa0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11011100 -> 10100011
  01010110 -> 10100110
  10001100 -> 00001001
  01101010 -> 11011001
  10110001 -> 01110100
  00001111 -> 00011111
  10001110 -> 00001101
  11100011 -> 11011010

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 00010010
